items.title: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
items.dek: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.
items.body: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Heatwave prompts Italy's delivery riders to strike for extra rights
items.dek: Delivery riders in Milan, Bologna and Florence want to protect their health and their wages.
items.body: Delivery riders in Milan, Bologna and Florence want to protect their health and their wages.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
items.dek: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.
items.body: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.
items.author: IriLine Desk
